description: Phase 31 scan_selftest_fn_parity: every function name listed in selftest's `for cmd in ...; do` loop must have a matching `<name>() {` definition in tool/_n6_lib. A typo, deleted function, or stale rename causes the selftest loop to execute an undefined command (rc=127) which gets recorded as FAIL — but that verdict looks like a scanner bug, not a registration drift. P31 turns the late runtime-discovery into a static gate on the code itself.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_selftest_fn_parity.json ] && jq -r "if .undefined_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_selftest_fn_parity.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
